---
title: "Teaching & CV"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

<span class="section-label">Teaching & Background</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

## Teaching Philosophy

My courses focus on applied economic reasoning for students pursuing careers in livestock production, ranch management, agribusiness, and agricultural lending. I use real market data, actual enterprise budgets, and current policy debates rather than textbook abstractions. Graduate courses use R for data analysis and applied econometrics.

---

## Courses Taught

<div class="course-row">
  <div>
    <div class="course-code">AGEC 3340</div>
    <div class="course-title">Ranch & Farm Financial Management</div>
  </div>
  <div class="course-level">Undergraduate</div>
</div>
<div class="course-row">
  <div>
    <div class="course-code">AGEC 4250</div>
    <div class="course-title">Livestock Markets & Price Analysis</div>
  </div>
  <div class="course-level">Undergraduate</div>
</div>
<div class="course-row">
  <div>
    <div class="course-code">AGEC 5410</div>
    <div class="course-title">Agricultural Risk Management</div>
  </div>
  <div class="course-level">Graduate</div>
</div>
<div class="course-row">
  <div>
    <div class="course-code">AGEC 6620</div>
    <div class="course-title">Applied Econometrics (R/tidyverse)</div>
  </div>
  <div class="course-level">Graduate</div>
</div>

---

## Graduate Students

**Current students**

| Student | Level | Topic |
|---------|-------|-------|
| [Name] | Ph.D. | [Dissertation topic] |
| [Name] | M.S.  | [Thesis topic] |

**Completed students**

| Student | Degree | Year | Placement |
|---------|--------|------|-----------|
| [Name] | Ph.D. | [Year] | [Position, Employer] |
| [Name] | M.S.  | [Year] | [Position, Employer] |

---

## Curriculum Vitae

::: {.row .g-5}
::: {.col-md-6}

### Education

<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2017</div><div><div class="cv-title">Ph.D., Agricultural Economics</div><div class="cv-place">[University Name]</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2013</div><div><div class="cv-title">M.S., Agricultural Economics</div><div class="cv-place">[University Name]</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2011</div><div><div class="cv-title">B.S., Agricultural Business</div><div class="cv-place">[University Name]</div></div></div>

### Positions

<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2021–</div><div><div class="cv-title">Associate Professor & Extension Economist</div><div class="cv-place">[University Name]</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2017–21</div><div><div class="cv-title">Assistant Professor & Extension Economist</div><div class="cv-place">[University Name]</div></div></div>

:::
::: {.col-md-6}

### Service & Awards

<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2024–</div><div><div class="cv-title">[Committee or Board]</div><div class="cv-place">[Organization]</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2023–</div><div><div class="cv-title">Associate Editor</div><div class="cv-place">[Journal Name]</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2022</div><div><div class="cv-title">[Award Name]</div><div class="cv-place">[Organization]</div></div></div>

### Professional Memberships

- Agricultural & Applied Economics Association (AAEA)
- Western Agricultural Economics Association (WAEA)
- [State] Agricultural Economics Society

:::
:::

::: {.text-center .mt-4}
[Download Full CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn-sage}
:::
